title: Mycoplasma Detection Protocol
author: Andrea Argouarch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8gphtvn
materials: Select DNA from the dropdown menu

After trypsinization for freezing cells, rinse remaining cells in both flasks with 12 mls 12 mL PBS Trypsin-EDTA (0.05%), phenol red Thermo Fisher Catalog #25300062 DPBS, no calcium, no magnesium Thermo Fisher Catalog #14190250

Extract gDNA with thermocycler program a. Turn on Power button on the back of machine b. Open lid with handle c. Put PCR tubes in small slot and close lid d. Select File, click Enter, select pcr chamber and start program i. 65C 65 °C for 15 mins 00:15:00 ii. 98C 98 °C for 10 mins 00:15:00 iii. 4C 4 °C to hold e. Run time around ~30mins 00:30:00 f. Click enter to exit after run g. Turn off machine and place on ice On ice

steps.title: Items to bring to nanodrop machine a
steps.instruction: Items to bring to nanodrop machine a. p2 pipette, p2 tips, pen, kimwipes, ice bucket b. Keep samples on ice On ice

steps.title: Open the NanoDrop 1000 software and...
steps.instruction: Open the NanoDrop 1000 software and select nucleic acid from the main menu

steps.title: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a kimwipe
steps.instruction: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a kimwipe

steps.title: Add 2 µl 2 µL of...
steps.instruction: Add 2 µl 2 µL of nuclease free water to the center of the pedestal and gently close the lever arm

steps.title: Click ‘OK’ to initialize the spectrophotometer
steps.instruction: Click ‘OK’ to initialize the spectrophotometer

steps.title: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a...
steps.instruction: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a kimwipe, add 2 µl 2 µL of a blank sample, and click ‘Blank’ a. Use quick extract solution as blank

steps.title: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a...
steps.instruction: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a kimwipe, add 2 ul 2 µL of sample and click ‘Measure’

steps.title: Record the concentration (ng/ul) of the...
steps.instruction: Record the concentration (ng/ul) of the sample on the tube and a table

steps.title: Record the 260/280 ratio, and the...
steps.instruction: Record the 260/280 ratio, and the 260/230 ratio 260/280 ratio should be above 1.8 (salt contamination) 260/230 ratio should be 1-2

steps.title: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a kimwipe in-between samples
steps.instruction: Clean the nanodrop pedestal with a kimwipe in-between samples

steps.title: Click exit
steps.instruction: Click exit

steps.title: Leave kimwipe between the pedestal and...
steps.instruction: Leave kimwipe between the pedestal and the lever arm when finished

steps.title: Culture should be in at least...
steps.instruction: Culture should be in at least 3-6 days of subculture after split

steps.title: During isolation and PCR, use clean...
steps.instruction: During isolation and PCR, use clean gloves, spray down bench, and keep reagents and tubes cold On ice

steps.title: Isolate cells once confluent, at least 3-6 days after split
steps.instruction: Isolate cells once confluent, at least 3-6 days after split

steps.title: Spin for 5 mins 00:05:00 at...
steps.instruction: Spin for 5 mins 00:05:00 at 100 rpm 1000 rpm at 4C 4 °C

steps.title: Place in ice bucket On ice...
steps.instruction: Place in ice bucket On ice on bench or store in -80C -80 °C

steps.title: Add 40 µl 40 µL of...
steps.instruction: Add 40 µl 40 µL of Quick Extract to pellet Epicentre QuickExtract™ DNA Extraction Solution Epicentre Catalog #QE09050

steps.title: Pipette up and down and transfer to PCR tubes a
steps.instruction: Pipette up and down and transfer to PCR tubes a. Label PCR tube with line, date, and P for pellet

steps.title: Centrifuge PCR tubes for 5 mins 00:05:00 at max 13
steps.instruction: Centrifuge PCR tubes for 5 mins 00:05:00 at max 13.4 rpm and transfer SN to new 1.5 mls tubes labeled gDNA, line, and date On ice a. Tiny pellet ok left in PCR tube

steps.title: Nanodrop to determine gDNA (pre-PCR) concentration on ice On ice
steps.instruction: Nanodrop to determine gDNA (pre-PCR) concentration on ice On ice

steps.title: Store at -20C -20 °C or run PCR
steps.instruction: Store at -20C -20 °C or run PCR

steps.title: Make a 20 µl 20 µL...
steps.instruction: Make a 20 µl 20 µL of PCR reaction in provided eMyco Plasma PCR Tube On ice e-Myco PLUS Mycoplasma PCR Detection Kit Contributed by users Catalog #25234 a. QS to 20 µl 20 µL with nuclease free water b. Add 40 ng 40 ng of sample i. Can make working stock if concentration is too high c. Include a negative control with just water (20 µl) 20 µL d. Include a positive control with provided positive control (1 µl) 1 µL

steps.title: Run PCR program a
steps.instruction: Run PCR program a. Turn on machine at the back b. Tap to mix, place samples into thermocycler in small tube holes, and close lid c. Run myco program Initial Denature = 94C 94 °C for 1 min 00:01:00 ii. 35 Cycles Denature = 94C 94 °C for 30 secs 00:00:30 Anneal = 58C 58 °C 5 for 20 secs 00:00:20 Extend = 72C 72 °C for 1 min 00:01:00 Final Extension = 72C 72 °C for 5 mins 00:05:00 Hold at 4C 4 °C d. Press enter to run program g. Run time is around ~1.5hrs 01:30:00

steps.title: Can prep for agarose gel near...
steps.instruction: Can prep for agarose gel near the end of the PCR run

steps.title: Store gDNA samples, at -20C -20 °C
steps.instruction: Store gDNA samples, at -20C -20 °C

steps.title: After run, select enter, turn off...
steps.instruction: After run, select enter, turn off machine, and place PCR product on ice On ice

steps.title: Run gel or store at -20C -20 °C
steps.instruction: Run gel or store at -20C -20 °C

steps.title: Wet rubber around gel chamber to...
steps.instruction: Wet rubber around gel chamber to help it slide into gel rig

steps.title: Assemble with rubber on the black...
steps.instruction: Assemble with rubber on the black edges of the gel rig and place purple comb in the slot on the right

steps.title: Make 2% Agarose in small beaker...
steps.instruction: Make 2% Agarose in small beaker with screw cap for a mini rig size. Agarose Contributed by users Catalog #PBSA1705 a.1.2 g 1.2 g of agarose with 60 mls 60 mL of 1X TAE (Stock is 20X TAE)

steps.title: Microwave for 2 mins 00:02:00 with...
steps.instruction: Microwave for 2 mins 00:02:00 with a loose cap and swirl every 30 seconds 00:00:30 until dissolved

steps.title: When temperature is cool to the...
steps.instruction: When temperature is cool to the touch, add 1:10,000 of Etbr Ethidium Bromide (1% Solution/Molecular Biology) Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP130210 Mutagen - may potentially cause carcinogenic or teratogenic effects ie add 6 µl 6 µL Etbr per 60 mls 60 mL of agarose

steps.title: Swirl to mix and add to...
steps.instruction: Swirl to mix and add to chamber to set, allow for 10 mins 00:10:00 to cool in cold room 4 °C

steps.title: Prep samples for gel in PCR...
steps.instruction: Prep samples for gel in PCR tubes on ice On ice a. 5 µl 5 µL of PCR product b. 3 µl 3 µL of Nuclease free water c. 2.6 µl 2.6 µL of 6X loading buffer (2X final concentration from a 6X stock, purple) Gel Loading Dye Blue (6X) - 4.0 ml New England Biolabs Catalog #B7021S i.(6X)(a) = (2X)(8ul); a = 2.6ul

steps.title: Rotate gel chamber when set, so...
steps.instruction: Rotate gel chamber when set, so the lanes are at the top of the chamber

steps.title: Fill with 1X TAE until the...
steps.instruction: Fill with 1X TAE until the top of the white knob in gel rig and remove comb slowly

steps.title: Load 4 µl 4 µL of...
steps.instruction: Load 4 µl 4 µL of 1kb O’gene plus ladder into first lane GeneRuler 1 kb Plus DNA Ladder, ready-to-use Thermo Fisher Catalog #SM1333

steps.title: Load 11 µl 11 µL of each sample per well
steps.instruction: Load 11 µl 11 µL of each sample per well

steps.title: Add lid, black at the top,...
steps.instruction: Add lid, black at the top, red at the bottom, both at the right side

steps.title: Run at 130V for 50 mins 00:50:00
steps.instruction: Run at 130V for 50 mins 00:50:00

steps.title: Store PCR product at -20C -20 °C
steps.instruction: Store PCR product at -20C -20 °C

steps.title: Dispose Etbr waste in proper container (liquid and solid)
steps.instruction: Dispose Etbr waste in proper container (liquid and solid)
